summary: Stop Sale Scheduler feature fully tested - All backend APIs working (20/20 tests passed), Frontend UI verified with Playwright. Holiday Quick Select, auto-fill dates, manual date editing, and scheduler CRUD all functional.
features_tested: GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/holidays - returns holiday periods with 3 categories (turkey, international, season)
POST /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/stop-sale-schedules - creates new schedule with name, dates, room_type_codes, auto_apply
DELETE /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/stop-sale-schedules/{id} - deletes schedule with optional remove_stop_sale
Frontend: Holiday Quick Select section shows 3 categories - Türk Tatili, Uluslararası, Sezon
Frontend: Clicking holiday button auto-fills dateFrom and dateTo fields
Frontend: Manuel Tarih Gir button allows manual date entry
Frontend: Date fields remain editable after holiday selection
Frontend: Zamanlayıcı Oluştur & Uygula button creates schedule
Frontend: Kayıtlı Zamanlayıcılar section shows saved schedules with delete/restore options
Frontend: Existing Stop Sale functionality (Satışı Durdur/Aç) still works

minor.issue: When auto_apply=true, response returns applied=False but DB is updated correctly. Response should reflect DB state.

backend_api_tests.holidays_list: PASS - Returns list with holidays field
backend_api_tests.holidays_fields: PASS - Each holiday has key, name, category, start_date, end_date, days, year
backend_api_tests.holidays_categories: PASS - Contains turkey, international, season categories
backend_api_tests.holidays_turkish: PASS - Contains Turkish holidays (Ramazan Bayramı, Kurban Bayramı, etc.)
backend_api_tests.holidays_easter: PASS - Contains Easter/Paskalya holidays (Batı and Ortodoks)
backend_api_tests.holidays_dates_valid: PASS - All dates in valid ISO format YYYY-MM-DD
backend_api_tests.schedule_create: PASS - POST creates schedule with correct fields
backend_api_tests.schedule_create_persists: PASS - Created schedule visible in GET list
backend_api_tests.schedule_delete: PASS - DELETE removes schedule from list
backend_api_tests.schedule_update: PASS - PATCH updates name and persists
backend_api_tests.schedule_update_dates: PASS - PATCH updates start_date and end_date
backend_api_tests.schedule_auto_apply: PASS - auto_apply=true marks schedule as applied in DB

frontend_ui_tests.stop_sale_tab: PASS - Stop Sale tab visible with data-testid='stop-sale-tab'
frontend_ui_tests.holiday_category_turkey: PASS - Türk Tatili category with Turkish holidays
frontend_ui_tests.holiday_category_international: PASS - Uluslararası category with Paskalya, Noel, etc.
frontend_ui_tests.holiday_category_season: PASS - Sezon category with Yaz Sezonu, Sömestr
frontend_ui_tests.holiday_auto_fill: PASS - Clicking holiday button auto-fills dates (e.g., Ramazan Bayramı: 20 Mar - 22 Mar)
frontend_ui_tests.manual_date_button: PASS - Manuel Tarih Gir button works
frontend_ui_tests.date_fields_editable: PASS - Date fields remain editable after holiday selection
frontend_ui_tests.room_type_checkboxes: PASS - Standart, Deluxe, Suite checkboxes present
frontend_ui_tests.select_all_button: PASS - Tümünü seç button selects all room types
frontend_ui_tests.save_schedule_btn: PASS - Zamanlayıcı Oluştur & Uygula button present
frontend_ui_tests.schedules_list: PASS - Kayıtlı Zamanlayıcılar section shows saved schedules
frontend_ui_tests.active_stop_sales: PASS - Aktif Stop Sale Durumu shows current stop sales by room type
frontend_ui_tests.channel_stop_sale: PASS - Kanal Bazlı Stop Sale shows Booking.com, Expedia, etc.

turkish_holidays_2026: 23 Nisan Ulusal Egemenlik ve Çocuk Bayramı (23 Nis)

action_items: MINOR: Fix POST /stop-sale-schedules to return updated schedule object with applied=True when auto_apply=true
critical_code_review_comments: Backend holidays endpoint correctly uses Python 'holidays' library for Turkish holidays
Easter dates calculated using 'dateutil.easter' - both Western and Orthodox Easter included
Frontend holiday buttons correctly mapped with data-testid='holiday-btn-{key}' format
Date auto-fill works when clicking holiday, but also allows manual editing afterwards
Scheduler CRUD operations follow proper REST patterns with 404 for not found
auto_apply feature correctly applies stop sale via bulk_grid_update when creating schedule
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stop Sale Scheduler feature fully tested. Holidays endpoint at GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/holidays returns Turkish holidays (from holidays library), international tourism holidays (Easter, Christmas), and season periods. Scheduler CRUD at /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/stop-sale-schedules supports create/read/update/delete with auto_apply option. Frontend at /rate-manager -> Stop Sale tab has holiday quick select that auto-fills dates, manual date entry, room type selection, and scheduler save functionality.
